get.description:
Upgrades the HTTP connection to a WebSocket and streams latest ticker price updates as JSON text frames. This endpoint is documented manually because WebSocket upgrade routes are not generated from protobuf HTTP annotations.

Connect to `ws://{host}/v1/ws/market/price?exchange=2&symbol=BTC%2FUSDT` or `wss://{host}/v1/ws/market/price?exchange=2&symbol=BTC%2FUSDT`.

After the `101 Switching Protocols` response, there is no HTTP response body. The client receives WebSocket text frames shaped as:

```json
{
  "symbol": "BTC/USDT",
  "price": 68420.12,
  "timestamp": "2026-06-07T10:15:30Z"
}
```

If streaming cannot continue after upgrade, the server may send an error frame before closing the connection:

```json
{
  "error": "failed to watch ticker"
}
```

parameters.name: exchange
parameters.description: Numeric exchange identifier from the Exchange enum, for example 1 for Tokocrypto or 2 for Binance.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Trading pair symbol, for example BTC/USDT.

101.description: Switching Protocols. The HTTP response has no JSON body; after upgrade, the WebSocket sends PriceStreamMessage JSON text frames.

400.description: Invalid request parameters before upgrade, such as missing exchange or symbol. Returned as a plain HTTP error response.

500.description: WebSocket upgrade or exchange streaming error.

get.description:
Upgrades the HTTP connection to a WebSocket and streams real-time order book (bids and asks) updates as JSON text frames.

Connect to `ws://{host}/v1/ws/market/orderbook?exchange=2&symbol=BTC%2FUSDT&limit=20`.

Supported exchanges stream via CCXT `watchOrderBook`; unsupported exchanges fall back to REST polling every 1 second. After the `101 Switching Protocols` response, the client receives WebSocket text frames shaped as:

```json
{
  "symbol": "BTC/USDT",
  "bids": [[68000.5, 1.2], [67999.0, 0.5]],
  "asks": [[68001.0, 0.8], [68002.5, 1.0]],
  "timestamp": "2026-06-08T12:55:50Z"
}
```

parameters.name: exchange
parameters.description: Numeric exchange identifier from the Exchange enum, for example 2 for Binance.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Trading pair symbol, for example BTC/USDT.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top bids and asks to return per update. Defaults to 20, max 100.

101.description: Switching Protocols. After upgrade, the WebSocket sends OrderBookStreamMessage JSON text frames.

500.description: WebSocket upgrade or exchange streaming error.

get.description: Serves the browser example used to load historical OHLCV candles and connect to the WebSocket latest price stream from the same HTTP origin. Open this route instead of the local file path to avoid browser CORS restrictions.

200.description: HTML page for the WebSocket candlestick example.

PriceStreamMessage.description: JSON message sent on the WebSocket stream for each latest ticker price update.

OrderBookStreamMessage.description: JSON message sent on the WebSocket stream for each order book update.

bids.description: List of buy orders sorted by price descending. Each entry is [price, volume].

asks.description: List of sell orders sorted by price ascending. Each entry is [price, volume].

WebSocketErrorMessage.description: JSON error message sent before the WebSocket connection is closed when streaming cannot continue after upgrade.
